name: Linear Issue Tracker
description: Project management tool with issue list, detail view, and filtering.

slotClasses.sidebar: w-56 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-gray-800 bg-gray-950 py-3

meta.dataShape: { id: string, name: string, icon: string, count: number, type: 'project' | 'view' | 'team' }
meta.styling: Dark sidebar, sections: My Issues, Projects, Views, Teams. Each item: icon + label + count badge. Active item has left blue bar. Hover: bg-gray-800.
meta.interactions: Click project → filters issue list. Click view (Backlog, Active, Done) → changes filter.

meta.dataShape: { id: string, identifier: string, title: string, status: 'backlog' | 'todo' | 'in_progress' | 'done' | 'cancelled', priority: 0|1|2|3|4, assignee: { name: string, avatar: string } | null, labels: string[], createdAt: string }
meta.styling: Table with rows. Each row: status icon (colored circle) + identifier (gray, mono) + title (white) + priority icon + assignee avatar + labels (colored pills). Row hover: bg-gray-800. Keyboard navigable. Groupable by status.
meta.interactions: Click row → opens detail in panel. Cmd+K → command palette. Arrow keys navigate. Status/priority inline-editable.

meta.dataShape: { status: string[], priority: number[], assignee: string[], label: string[], search: string }
meta.styling: Horizontal bar above issue list. Filter chips: Status, Priority, Assignee, Label. Active filters shown as removable chips. Search input on right with Cmd+K hint.
meta.interactions: Click filter → dropdown with options. Select → adds chip. Click chip X → removes. Type in search → filters in real-time.

meta.dataShape: { id: string, identifier: string, title: string, description: string, status: string, priority: number, assignee: object | null, labels: string[], comments: { author: string, text: string, time: string }[], activity: { type: string, time: string }[] }
meta.styling: Title editable at top (large, bold). Status/priority/assignee as dropdown selectors in row below title. Description as rich text editor. Activity timeline below. Comments at bottom with input.
meta.interactions: Edit title inline. Click status/priority/assignee → dropdown to change. Type description → auto-saves. Add comment → emits comment-added.

issues.flow: User sees projects/views in sidebar. Selects a project → issue list filters. Scans issues by status groups. Clicks an issue → detail panel opens on right. Edits status/priority/assignee inline. Adds comments.
